# publish

Read-only review surface for the marketplace publish flow. Walks the
worktree's plugin tree and renders it in a master-detail pane so the
user can inspect what would be published. Decorative for now ‚Äî no
publish action wired up.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN ‚Äî do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Review the worktree's plugin tree before publishing to the marketplace. Read-only review surface for the marketplace publish flow. Walks the worktree's plugin tree and exposes it as a flat tree.
- Exports (web):
  - Values: `publishPane`
- Contributes:
  - `Pane.Register` `publish`
  - `Shell.Sidebar` "Publish" (group `System`)
  - `publishPane.open`
- Server:
  - `GET /api/publish/tree`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
